productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Boat CC Lace Blue Sports Shoes
description: Grippy, lightweight and breathable, the adidas Boat Lace shoes feature CLIMACOOL® to channel cooling comfort around your entire foot. These water shoes have a quick-drying fabric upper and reinforced toe protection and are available in your favourite fresh fruit inspired colour and scent. Perfect for watersports or outdoors activities, these shoes have all the ventilation, breathability and comfort of a sandal Upper CLIMACOOL® upper to channel cooling comfort and ventilate your entire foot EVA tongue top for solid support Stretchable panel at heel for comfortable Fit High-grip cord laces to give customised fit whatever the weather Midsole adidas drainage system (ADS) for maximum water drainage Outsole TRAXION® outsole gives great grip in all directions and conditions &ndash even when it's wet and slippery underfoot shoe care Remove dirt with a damp cloth
